missables: Al Bhed Primer Vol. IV — on the bar counter in Kilika Port (find the crying girl in the rubble first; she moves to the bar and unlocks it). Cannot return to Kilika — permanently missable.
Red Armlet — Destruction Sphere chest, Kilika Temple. Cannot return to Kilika Temple after leaving — this is permanently missable.
NulBlaze Shield — given by the first Crusaders sentry in Kilika Woods only if Lord Ochu has already been defeated. Speak to the sentry before leaving the chapter.
sgTip: Any spare AP from the Kilika Woods encounters is worth putting toward Lulu's early Black Magic nodes — she is your primary damage dealer through the next two chapters. Wakka's Sphere Grid also branches into useful stat nodes near his starting position.

subLocations.name: Kilika Port
subLocations.prose: The port is in ruins after Sin's attack. Follow the party west along the docks until Yuna is found with the survivors, performing the Sending. The next morning, before reporting to Wakka, complete two tasks in town: west of the docks, find the crying girl hiding in the rubble and speak to her — she moves to the local bar, where an Ether appears in a chest and Al Bhed Primer Vol. IV sits on the bar counter. The Potion chest is north of the inn. The merchant woman near the south chest sells arms and armor for all party members — check for upgrades, but do not buy Wakka's Scout weapon; a free one is found in the woods shortly. Visit Wakka at the east end of the pier when ready to board.

subLocations.name: Kilika Woods
subLocations.prose: A tutorial battle triggers immediately on entering the forest — use Kimahri's Lancet on the Ragora to learn Seed Cannon, and make a habit of Lanceting every new enemy type going forward. Luzzu and Gatta stand beyond the Al Bhed sign and introduce Lord Ochu, an optional boss in the clearing ahead. He is challenging but entirely skippable: the thin passage to the west loops north past his position and leads to a chest holding Wakka's free Scout weapon. If you do defeat Lord Ochu, talk to Luzzu immediately for an Elixir. The first Crusaders sentry on the main path gives a Remedy; if Lord Ochu is already dead when you speak to her, she also awards a NulBlaze Shield — make sure to claim it before leaving the chapter. The second sentry to the northeast gives a Hi-Potion. Collect the Mana Spheres from the east passage, pick up the Luck Sphere at the end of the central north-south path, then head east to the lakeshore and north to the temple stairs where Sinspawn Geneaux attacks.

items.name: NulBlaze Shield (Crusaders sentry — only if Lord Ochu already defeated)
Elixir (from Luzzu after Lord Ochu — optional)

subLocations.name: Kilika Temple
subLocations.prose: Work through the fire-sphere puzzle to reach the deep chamber. Before leaving via the exit door, obtain the Destruction Sphere from the secret chamber on the top platform and use it in the slot beneath the ledge to reveal the Red Armlet chest. This is permanently missable — unlike Besaid, you cannot return to Kilika Temple at any point in the game.

bosses.strategy: Optional fight in Kilika Woods (4,649 HP / Overkill 800) — skip if underleveled; the reward is an Elixir from Luzzu and a NulBlaze Shield from the Crusaders sentry (only awarded if Ochu is already dead when you speak to him). Lord Ochu's main threats are Poison and heavy physicals — cure Poison immediately with Antidotes or Yuna's Esuna. Spam Lulu's Fire spells (its weakness); cast Haste on Lulu if Tidus has learned it to accelerate damage output. Below 2,000 HP, Lord Ochu switches to Earthquake — summon Valefor at this point, as Valefor is completely immune to Earthquake. Lord Ochu also falls asleep periodically to begin regenerating HP; wake him immediately with normal physical attacks (not spells) the moment Z's appear above his head, then finish the fight quickly.

Phase 1 (shell form, 3,000 HP / Overkill 900): The shell absorbs magic — do NOT cast spells on the body. The tentacles (450 HP / Overkill 500 each) also absorb magic. Destroy both tentacles first using physical attacks; once they are gone, use Kimahri's Lancet (piercing physical) to chip away at the shell body — only Kimahri's piercing weapon can damage it in this phase. Phase 2 (shell destroyed, body exposed): Geneaux is now vulnerable to everything — use Lulu's Fire spells (weakness) and physicals freely. Throughout the fight, watch for Geneaux's Venom attack which can poison the whole party; use Antidotes or Yuna's Esuna to clear it immediately. Keep Yuna in reserve for healing.
